untranslatable_reason: Signal requires multi-timeframe analysis (higher timeframe structure validation, pullback range detection on HTF, trend confirmation on HTF) which cannot be expressed with single-timeframe indicators. Specific parameters needed: pullback_zone_percentile, min_retests threshold, and higher_timeframe_lookback_bars are not quantified in source material.
translation_notes: Attempted approximation uses Donchian channels as breakout level proxy and price_pos_20 for pullback zone positioning, but this does NOT capture the core multi-timeframe alignment logic. A proper implementation requires explicit HTF data feeds and cross-timeframe comparison logic outside standard indicator scope. The retest requirement (min_retests) cannot be operationalized without parameter specification.
